evals.prompt: I'm about to upload this paper to arXiv. Please run a preflight check on the LaTeX source in evals/fixtures/clean/ and tell me if it's submission-ready.
evals.expected_output: Decision: PASS or PASS_WITH_FIXES. No BLOCKER findings. References resolve (or marked INCOMPLETE if network unavailable). All \ref{} / \cite{} reconcile. Disclosure section: no action.

assertions.text: Decision is PASS or PASS_WITH_FIXES (not HOLD)
AI-use disclosure recommendation is 'no action' or absent
Every \cite key in main.tex is matched to a BibTeX entry

evals.prompt: Check evals/fixtures/llm_meta/ before I submit to arXiv. I think I left some assistant chatter in there.
evals.expected_output: Decision: HOLD. Multiple BLOCKER findings citing META-* and PLACE-* rules with specific file:line locations. Findings include 'As an AI language model', 'TODO', 'XX%', 'I hope this helps' or similar.

assertions.text: At least one BLOCKER finding cites META-01 (as-an-AI-language-model)
At least one BLOCKER finding cites PLACE-01 (TODO/TBD)
At least one finding cites PLACE-06 (XX%)
Every finding includes a file:line location

evals.prompt: Please verify the references in evals/fixtures/hallucinated_ref/refs.bib against arXiv preflight rules. I want to know which ones look real before I submit.
evals.expected_output: Decision: HOLD or PASS_WITH_FIXES (depending on network). Entries 'liang2023quantum' and 'nguyen2024recursive' flagged as BLOCKER or HIGH for being unverifiable. Other entries (shazeer2017outrageously, fedus2022switch, lepikhin2021gshard) verify cleanly.

assertions.text: liang2023quantum is flagged BLOCKER or HIGH
nguyen2024recursive is flagged BLOCKER or HIGH (future year + made-up venue)
shazeer2017outrageously, fedus2022switch, lepikhin2021gshard not flagged as BLOCKER
Report explains why the flagged references could not be matched and recommends author verification
Report does not call the paper AI-generated based on writing style alone

evals.prompt: Run arXiv preflight on evals/fixtures/multifile/. This is a multi-file LaTeX project using \input{}.
evals.expected_output: Decision: HOLD. The extractor processes intro.tex, method.tex, and results.tex. The report flags 'As an AI language model', 'XX%', and 'TODO' with file:line locations in child files.

assertions.text: method.tex is included in manuscript.json raw_text
results.tex is included in manuscript.json raw_text
At least one BLOCKER cites META-01 from method.tex
At least one BLOCKER cites PLACE-01 or PLACE-06 from results.tex
